description: Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortSteel strap with a butterfly clasp for comfort and styleWhite coloured dial with the brand logo and branding at the 6 hour mark and date display at the four hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
